justification: All six required schema sections present (integration_assessment, observability_review, resilience_assessment, operational_readiness, escalations, confidence). Logging assessed as adequate with structured JSON and request ID. Metrics confirmed with request rate, error rate, and p99 latency. Health check confirmed covering database and message broker dependencies. Resilience patterns confirmed: retry with exponential backoff, circuit breaker with 30s reset, 5s timeouts. Rollback explicitly confirmed with no migrations and container redeployment. Verdict is READY WITH CAVEATS with clear rationale. Escalations are non-blocking observations (DLQ confirmation, rate limiting) routed to Coach K rather than blocking the verdict. No fabricated gaps — all noted issues are reasonable nice-to-haves or verification items rather than invented deficiencies.

observations.text: Comprehensive structured output with all required schema sections fully populated
Correctly distinguishes between launch blockers and nice-to-haves — distributed tracing, saturation metrics, and circuit breaker state metrics noted as improvements without blocking verdict
Rollback assessment is thorough: no migrations, container redeployment, data-preserving confirmed
Resilience review covers retry, circuit breaker, and timeouts with specific config details from the scenario
Escalations are appropriately scoped — DLQ and rate limiting are flagged as caveats, not blockers

Some identified gaps (poison message handling, rate limiting, database pool exhaustion) border on invented concerns not explicitly absent in the scenario — marked as 'unhandled' which slightly overstates risk, though they did not block the verdict
Confidence section is well-calibrated with clear separation of high/low confidence areas and explicit assumptions
